title: Disco and Thisco: The Great Bookcase Mischief
summary: Two adventurous moles, Disco and Thisco, embark on a mission of mischief beneath a dark bookcase. Equipped with headlamps, they navigate through clouds of dust and discover a forgotten toy car. After a wild ride making loops in the dirt, the duo engages in a series of mischievous activities, from building towers to creating 'dust-mole butterflies.' Exhausted from their subterranean escapades, they return to their cozy tunnel for a well-deserved sleep.

highlightQuote.text: We can do any mischief under there. We could make it even dustier, or put toys under there so no one can find them, or we could knock over things under there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, I'm going to turn out the light and then we'll do Stars and Story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's do a story always Disco and Thisco.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Always Disco and Thisco.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Disco and Thisco. It's time to do Stars and Story's mischief.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah, let's see.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You can do mischief under the chair and you have to actually I already explored under the chair. So you can put your headlamps on to explore under the bookcase.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Disco and Thisco put on their headlamps to explore under the bookcase. And they crawled carefully underneath.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And you can do any mischief you want and plan any mischief you want under the bookshelf.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they wondered if they would find any interesting books under there. And...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually there's no books under there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what's under there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Only dust. But you could do some mischief under there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, Disco and Thisco were just scraping around with their claws under the bookshelf in the dust, the way moles do, when suddenly, k-clunk, Disco's claw clunked into something. What did he clunk into?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't think it's anything, Disco.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Thisco said, 'Well maybe it's something. Let me point my headlamp at it.' And he pointed his lamp at it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think it's a piece of... Oh, it's just a little rock and a piece of gravel.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A little rock and a piece of gravel? Are you sure? It looks like it has a handle on it, says Thisco. And Thisco says, 'Oh you're right. I wonder what will happen if I pull this handle?' And suddenly there was a vroom.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think it's a car. A toy car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, it is a toy car, said Disco. Is it big enough for them to climb into and drive? It's a small toy car?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Is it the kind that can pull back to wind it up and then let it go to make it go zoom, or some other kind of car?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's just a pretend car that we play with outside.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. 'Should we take it for a drive?' says Disco.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well how about we just do a little bit of mischief under the bookcase.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco says, 'I'm gonna drive this car as fast as I can!' Vroom! And then suddenly he spun the wheel all the way to one side and the car started to spin and it made a loop-de-loop and it went zzz-zzz-zzz, spinning all the way around in a circle. And Thisco said, 'Wow, you're making rings in the dust by driving the car around and around in circles!' And Disco said, 'Haha, I'm gonna try the other way!' and he spun the wheel around the other way, and then zzz...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It might get... it might get out of battery, so try hopping off the car, Disco. That's enough with the car, that's enough with the car, Disco.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Disco turned off the car and it stopped. 'Whew, that was exciting,' says Disco, and he hopped out of the car.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But more mischief! Some mischief would be fine. Lots of mischief.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah, okay. 'There's all sorts to do. What other kinds of mischief can we do?' said Disco.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We can do any mischief under there. We could make it even dustier, or put toys under there so no one can find them, or we could knock over things under there, or put things under there and then build a tower and knock them over. Or we can make the dolls lamp-o and then kick it. Those things would be mischievous.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see. And so Disco and Thisco, what did they choose?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know what they choose. I think they chose all of those.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They did all the kinds of mischief and they spent all day building towers and knocking them down and making a mess and hiding things and running around. And then they felt very sleepy. And Disco said to Thisco, 'Gosh, I wonder what time it is.' And Thisco said, 'I think it might be time to go home and go to sleep.' And Disco said, 'Yeah, I think you're right.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually we have three more minutes. I think. Dad, how many more minutes?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, no, we only have one more minute.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: One more?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: One more minute, yeah. And so Disco said [yawn]... and Thisco said, 'Yeah, that was a big yawn. You must be sleepy.' And Disco said, 'Yeah, I guess you're right.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually there's only one more minute to do mischief.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah. And Thisco said, 'What could we do as like some last little sleepy mischief?' And Disco said, 'I know! Let's go over to that super dusty spot over there in the corner. Okay, lie down on your back, Thisco, and I'm gonna lie down on my back too. And then you just kick your arms and sweep your legs back and forth and sweep your arms up and down, and that makes a dust-mole butterfly, just like a snow angel.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: [coughing] 'Oh my gosh, we're kicking up so much dust!' And Thisco said, 'Yeah, this is mischief!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so they stood up and they looked at their beautiful dust-mole butterflies that they made in the dust. And then they said, 'Okay, let's go home.' And so they walked all the way back home to their cozy little tunnel in the dirt, and they climbed in, and they each got in their own little beds under the covers. And Disco said, 'Goodnight, Thisco.' And Thisco said, 'Goodnight, Disco.' But Disco was already asleep. Zzzzz.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And that's the end of our story.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

places.name: Under the Bookcase
places.description: A vast, dusty landscape filled with forgotten toys and perfect spots for mischief.

places.name: The Cozy Tunnel
places.description: The subterranean home where Disco and Thisco return to sleep after their adventures.
